name: Savory Sauerkraut
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon celery seed, or caraway seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the fat in a skillet until golden brown.
2. Add the sauerkraut and seasoning to the skillet.
3. Mix well using a fork to separate the kraut.
4. Cover and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Serve hot.
